description_long: This is a pair of high-heeled sandals featuring a striking red color on the straps and heel counter, contrasted with a sleek black insole and outsole. The design includes a thin front toe strap and a delicate ankle strap that wraps around and fastens above the heel, providing both style and support. The stiletto heel is tall and slender, giving the shoes an elegant and fashionable appearance suitable for urban nightlife or formal occasions. The materials appear to be a combination of glossy synthetic leather or patent leather for the upper, with a likely rubber or synthetic sole for durability and grip. The shoes are open-toed, exposing the front of the foot, and the overall construction suggests a lightweight yet sturdy build. No visible logos or branding are present, and the shoes appear to be in pristine, unworn condition.
description: A pair of red high-heeled sandals with thin ankle and toe straps, black insoles, and tall stiletto heels. The shoes are glossy, open-toed, and appear new.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, thin red toe straps, and the black insoles.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the tall stiletto heel, curved arch, and the wrap-around ankle strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red heel counters, slim stiletto heels, and the back of the ankle straps.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the elegant arch, glossy red straps, and the overall slender silhouette.
